artists.name: Alemu Aga
artists.biography: Master of the Begena, the Ethiopian harp. Alemu Aga is renowned for his spiritual and meditative performances.

artists.name: Zerfu Demissie
artists.biography: Zerfu Demissie is a renowned Ethiopian master of the Begena. He is the son of Demissie Desta.

albums.title: Akotet
albums.description: Released in 2008 under the Netherlands-based label Terp Records, Akotet is a rare, raw look into the world of traditional Ethiopian court music. The entire album was tracked live on August 12, 2006, inside Zerfu Demissie's bedroom in Addis Ababa, capturing a mesmerizing, deep buzzing drone unique to the begena.

artists.name: Alemayehu Fanta
artists.biography: He was prominent for his mastery of traditional Ethiopian musical instruments, the masinkoand begena. He was also known for his patriotic Ethiopian songs. He taught music at Yared Music School in Addis Ababa for about 40 years, according to sources.

artists.name: Sosena Gebre Eyesus
artists.biography: Ethiopian artist Sosena Gebre Eyesus sings accompanied by her playing of the Begena, or King David's Harp, one of the world’s oldest and most beguiling instruments.
